title: 阪神JFの後に・自分の意志で

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right! That was pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And it was a G1, too. Surely people will start
seeing me as—

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Cityyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Did you all see me run?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You're so pretty when you run! City, you're
the best!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Gold City, huh? I've never heard of her before,
but she looks so gorgeous when she runs.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She really was beautiful... Who knew someone
could look that good so sweaty?! Models are
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: "Pretty"? "Beautiful"? Give me a break...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
In the end, they're still just praising my looks. Is
that all I'm good for?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Cityyy! Look at us!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh... I like the look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Very interestin'. I gotta get on and make my
debut soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... bzzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uhh, hello?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What do you want? I told you not to call me on
race days, remember?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't be so cranky. I just wanted to let you
know how I felt about the race.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
First of all, good job. It was a great race. You met
your fans' expectations perfectly. And your
running, it was just so...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: So beautiful.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Keep up the great work on the Tiara tour and
show us more of your brilliance. This will give a
boost to your modeling career as well.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: You are going for the Triple Tiara, right? I'm looking forward to it. Well then, good luck.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Now I get it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Make yourself a doll and that's all they'll see you
as.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Just a pretty doll with no will of its own.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I chose the Hanshin J.F. because it's what my fans
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But that's just pandering to those who want to see
me for my beauty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's the same with my modeling. After all, it wasn't
me who decided to take that path.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No wonder I can't change. All I do is what others
tell me.
choice_data_list: You just didn't want to let them down.
You just didn't want to let them down.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So, what? I can't do anything about it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I won't settle for that. Sure, I do want to please
my fans...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I want to choose how, even if it means betraying expectations. If I don't, I'll never get what I want.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll make them accept me on my own terms!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So, I've decided. I won't run in the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the best. And that means going for
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown consists of the Satsuki
Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho, each of
which is held around the same time as a
corresponding Tiara tour race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the most prestigious tour of all. In particular,
those who win the Derby are all but guaranteed
to go down in history.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You might have had plans in place for me to win
the Tiara tour, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Do you mind if I turn that all upside down?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I won't thank you yet. I already told you how I'm
selfish.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'll repay you by making you famous as a
Derby trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to finish first in the world's most heated
race. Then...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They'll have to recognize me for who I am. For my
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to make preparations for the
Classic Triple Crown's first race—the Satsuki Sho.
